_comment: PDF Text Extractor V2 - Configuration File
_note: Box API credentials are required to connect to Box Online. See README.md for setup instructions.

box._help: Create a Box App at https://app.box.com/developers/console to get these values.
box._folder_id_note: folder_id = source Box folder to sync FROM. output_folder_id = Box folder to upload Extracted files TO.

local._local_folder_note: Path (relative to this config) where Box files are synced to locally.
local._extracted_folder_note: Sub-folder where all extracted output files are saved locally before being synced to Box output_folder_id.
local._archive_folder_note: Source PDFs are moved here after successful extraction so they are not re-processed on the next scan.

sync._auto_sync_note: Set auto_sync_enabled=true to sync Box folder automatically at startup and every interval_minutes.

ica._help: IBM Consulting Advantage (ICA) 1.0 — session-cookie based API.
ica._auth: Paste the ENTIRE cookie string from DevTools → Request Headers → cookie (all cookies, not just ica_core_auth_proxy).
